records.what_was_bought: 9xp Elemental Mastery is your primary Path
3xp  Lure of Flames is your second
3xp  Movement of Mind is your third
3xp  Weather Control is y our fourth

rows:
Sire: Violata Zota
Embraced: 1911 (Hungary)

You were born and trained as a hedge mage, worked in conjunction with the Lupines called Children of Gaia a few times, met a changeling, and served a master mage of the Verbanae tradition.  The last was your downfall,  you were perverse and had a "thing" for those whom your master did not approve of and had ordered you to stay away from.  One day you were entertaining and your master came home early from a trip, he discovered you in your deviance.  In his anger and outrage he stripped you of your powers, and cast you out.  You took your anger and vengeance and went to the only place you knew could give you power after you had been stripped in such a fashion, you well knew how he would have spread word of your deviance.  House Tremere, the vampire house would take you in and provide you the means to be more than just some servant.  Since the early 1900's you have been a Tremere in service to the pyramid, and your new masters will help you make your old master suffer.  You were able to track down a recentlyl released apprentice of his last year, when you captured and interrogated her you discovered that he was supposed to be in the north of Los Angeles, in America.  As luck has it, your clan has put out the call for members to go to LA, you can look like you are responding to a clan call, and you can carry out your purpose at the same time.

#1 Go to LA and set yourself up in the chantry, let no one suspect your real reson for being here has nothing to do with them or their cause here.  #2 You have heard that the Clan Nosferatu can find out anything, make allies of them, or at least a key one; they can assist you in finding your sire, and avoid his magical protections.  #3  Find and kill your sire
#1  Isha Patel - She is reputed to be a master of a great many lores, it is also rumoured that she was a mage prior to embrace
#2  Elof - he is supposed to be of Clan Gangrel, the apprentice you "interrogated" babbled something tangenital about him and you heard his name, something about a ritual centered on him

#3  Louis Fortier - You and he met once when you were traveling throug Los Angeles in the late 1930's, it might be interesting to see if he can be of any help in your hunt if the Camarilla resources fail you
